mapper.select: SELECT ID, CERT_RENEW_CREATE_AT, USER_ID, CERT_RENEW_TYPE, CERT_RECEIVE_TYPE, CERT_NO, CERT_NAME, CERT_PHONE, CERT_ADDRESS, CERT_RENEW_STATUS FROM TBL_CERT_RENEW WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY CERT_RENEW_CREATE_AT DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CERT_RENEW.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_CERT_RENEW ( ID, CERT_RENEW_CREATE_AT, USER_ID, CERT_RENEW_TYPE, CERT_RECEIVE_TYPE, CERT_NO, CERT_NAME, CERT_PHONE, CERT_ADDRESS, CERT_RENEW_STATUS ) VALUES ( #{id}, SYSDATE, #{userId}, #{certRenewType}, #{certReceiveType}, #{certNo}, #{certName}, #{certPhone}, #{certAddress}, 'processing' )
